evidence: Skill provider promised a 200-word summary within 60 seconds for $0.05 USDC. Caller paid via x402, request was accepted (HTTP 200) but the response stream timed out at 18 seconds with only 47 words returned. Provider claims 'partial delivery is non-refundable per service agreement clause 4.2'. Caller demands full refund + 0.5x penalty per the Pneuma SLA template.

claims.plaintiff: Full refund (0.05 USDC) + SLA penalty (0.025 USDC) for non-delivery.
claims.defendant: Partial output delivered in good faith; clause 4.2 of provider TOS waives refunds on partial completion.
